docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA INES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCMANUS ROBERT $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $329.00, PLTF TO TURN OVER THE REMAINING DRAPE IN HER POSS- ESSION TO DEFT AT THE TIME DEFT PAYS THE JUDGMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
